active_goal: Focused Tahoe/macOS modern UI alignment pass for issue #5

features.title: Use system-provided macOS chrome for primary controls and status
features.evidence: AgendumNeo/Views/RootView.swift uses SwiftUI toolbar content for namespace and refresh controls, plus a bottom safeAreaInset with .bar background. AgendumNeo/AppModel.swift reloads namespaces when refresh is invoked before an active namespace exists. Build and test succeeded on 2026-05-15.
features.notes: Matches Apple guidance to rely on standard controls for the new design rather than custom content-layer glass.

features.title: Make inbox rows fit modern compact macOS windows
features.evidence: AgendumNeo/Views/ItemRow.swift replaces fixed column widths with adaptive title/metadata rows. Build and test succeeded on 2026-05-15.
features.notes: Keeps the inbox usable in the existing small window and menu-bar window sizes.

features.title: Align project metadata with macOS Tahoe requirement
features.evidence: project.yml now sets deploymentTarget.macOS and MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET to 26.0; xcodebuild used MacOSX26.5.sdk successfully.
features.notes: README already listed macOS 26 and Xcode 26 requirements.
